---
title: "Market Research & American Business, 1935-1965"
page-layout: article
---

# Market Research & American Business, 1935-1965

## Description

Digital archive of market research reports and consumer studies from mid-twentieth-century American business. Supports research on advertising, consumer culture, and business history.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Business & Economics, News & Media, Humanities & History
- **Data/resource type:** Market Research, Historical Archives
- **Access model:** Yale Licensed
- **Displayed topic:** Market Research, Historical Archives

## Links

- [Access resource](https://yale.idm.oclc.org/login?URL=http://www.consumerculture.amdigital.co.uk/)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
